subject: Re: Boston Lease
body:
dec 08
--- DKIESQ@aol.com wrote:

> Currently, the cambridge lease extension agreement
> provides for an  extension 
> until July 31, 2007, with the right to further
> extend until December  31, 
> 2007 by giving notice of extension by no later than
> June 15, 2007.   Your request 
> to extend for one year.....is that one year from
> July 31,  2007?  from 
> December 31, 2007? or from the end of this month?  
>  
> In other words, do you want the apartment through
> May 31, 2008?    through 
> July 31, 2008?  or through December 31, 2008? 
> Please  advise.
>  
> At your request, I have previously delivered to GVD
> for safekeeping durable

>

body_html:
dec 08
--- DKIESQ@aol.com wrote:

Currently, the cambridge lease extension agreement
provides for an extension
until July 31, 2007, with the right to further
extend until December 31,
2007 by giving notice of extension by no later than
June 15, 2007. Your request
to extend for one year.....is that one year from
July 31, 2007? from
December 31, 2007? or from the end of this month?

In other words, do you want the apartment through
May 31, 2008? through
July 31, 2008? or through December 31, 2008?
Please advise.

At your request, I have previously delivered to GVD
for safekeeping durable
powers signed by you in favor of each of GM and DKI.

Darren K. Indyke
Attorney-At-Law
457 Madison Avenue
4th Floor
New York, New York 10022
Tel: 212-750-1176
Fax: 212-750-0381
e-mail: dkiesq@aol.com (mailto:dkiesq@aol.com)
